products.name: Sauvage
products.description: A radically fresh composition, dictated by a name that has the ring of a manifesto.

products.name: Bleu de Chanel
products.description: A woody aromatic fragrance for the man who defies convention.

products.name: Acqua di Gio
products.description: A resolutely masculine fragrance born from the sea, the sun, the earth, and the breeze of a Mediterranean island.

products.name: Eros
products.description: Love, passion, beauty, and desire are the key concepts behind the new men's fragrance by Versace.

products.name: Fahrenheit
products.description: A unique and contrasting signature, with a powerful enchanting trail. Fresh Sicilian Mandarin notes, and the surprising combination of masculine Wood and Leather.

reviews.reviewBody: Awesome fresh scent, lasts very long on my skin.
A classic aquatic fragrance. Perfect for summer.
Smells like a mechanic's garage in the best possible way. Extremely masculine.
Un parfum extraordinar și foarte persistent!
